Interior Design Category

Celebrates exceptional interior spaces that balance functionality and aesthetics. This category includes residential, commercial, hospitality, cultural, and exhibition interiors that enhance user experience
through thoughtful design and atmosphere.

Architectural Design Category

Honours innovative architectural projects that shape the built environment. This category welcomes designs that respond creatively to context, structure, and human needs, transforming spaces into inspiring works of architecture.

Registration

Design Category

Highlights original furniture and product designs that combine beauty, functionality, and innovation. This category includes everyday objects, and systems that improve how people live, work, and interact.

Lighting Design Category

Showcases imaginative and impactful lighting designs that define mood and atmosphere. This category covers lighting products, installations, and architectural applications that elevate environments through the art of light.

Packaging and Graphic

Recognises exceptional packaging and branding that convey identity and creativity through compelling visuals, refined structure, and engaging storytelling across physical and digital platforms.

Registration

Read More

The Arch Design Award celebrates excellence and innovation across the creative disciplines that shape our built and visual environment. The program recognises remarkable achievements in Architectural Design, Interior Design, Furniture and Product Design, Lighting Design, and Packaging and Graphic Design. Open to designers, studios, and creative professionals worldwide, the award honours projects that push boundaries, elevate everyday experiences, and inspire through design. Winners establish their reputation on an international stage, gaining visibility that strengthens their professional and creative journey.

Thank you for subscribing!

Q: What is ARCH-ID and how can I get it?
A: ARCH-ID is a personal code, it helps to identify the Designers and the Submitted Designs. You will receive your ARCH-ID within 3 business days after you purchased a Registration Ticket.
 

Q: I have a Registration Ticket, can I submit my Design later?
A: Yes, of course! You will be allowed to submit your project at any time, before the final submission deadline: 05 March 2025, 24:00 GMT+3. Please note, the registration fees are constantly increasing during the different registration periods, we advise you to buy the Registration Ticket(s) at a discounted price in advance as you can submit your Design later.

Q: Are there any extra fees for the Winners to receive the Winners' Kit?
A: There are no hidden costs and expenses in Arch Design Award. The Early, Standard Late and Final Registration Tickets include everything except the Exclusive Crystal Glass Trophy.
